title: Pod Security Standards — Restricted Pod Security Standard changes
text:
Another important change, made in Kubernetes v1.25 is that the
Restricted
policy
has been updated to use the
pod.spec.os.name
field. Based on the OS name, certain policies that are specific
to a particular OS can be relaxed for the other OS.
Restrictions on the following controls are only required if
.spec.os.name
is not
windows
:
Privilege Escalation
Seccomp
Linux Capabilities
